metadata.description: Daily closing prices for 24 major U.S. stocks, 1987-01-02 through 1989-12-29.
metadata.source: Kaggle 'Huge Stock Market Dataset' (Boris Marjanovic), originally from Stooq/Yahoo Finance. Accessed via github.com/scienclick/stocks

tickers.CAT: Caterpillar (substitute for GM — old GM ticker lacks pre-2010 data)
tickers.HON: Honeywell (substitute for DuPont — DD ticker disrupted by DowDuPont)

notes: GM and DuPont (DD) tickers unavailable in dataset; substituted with CAT and HON.
Black Monday: 1987-10-19 — expect large drops across all names.
All 24 tickers have complete daily coverage with no gaps.
metadata.completeness_issues: None — all 24 tickers present every trading day
